'''sazolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideaway|hideaway]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideaway|hideaway]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sazolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæzeleth|sæzeleth]] || [[word:sæzelej|sæzelej]] || [[word:sæzelesh|sæzelesh]] || [[word:sæzele|sæzele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sazozoloth|sazozoloth]] || [[word:sazozoloj|sazozoloj]] || [[word:sazozolosh|sazozolosh]] || [[word:sazozolo|sazozolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sazoloth|sazoloth]] || [[word:sazoloj|sazoloj]] || [[word:sazolosh|sazolosh]] || [[word:sazolo|sazolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sazofloth|sazofloth]] || [[word:sazofloj|sazofloj]] || [[word:sazoflosh|sazoflosh]] || [[word:sazoflof|sazoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sazolotho|sazolotho]] || [[word:sazolojo|sazolojo]] || [[word:sazolosho|sazolosho]] || [[word:sazoloko|sazoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sazoloth|sazoloth]] || [[word:sazoloj|sazoloj]] || [[word:sazolosh|sazolosh]] || [[word:sazolo|sazolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sazolothol|sazolothol]] || [[word:sazolojol|sazolojol]] || [[word:sazoloshol|sazoloshol]] || [[word:sazolokol|sazolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sazolothotho|sazolothotho]] || [[word:sazolojojo|sazolojojo]] || [[word:sazoloshosho|sazoloshosho]] || [[word:sazoloko|sazoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sazolothon|sazolothon]] || [[word:sazolojon|sazolojon]] || [[word:sazoloshon|sazoloshon]] || [[word:sazolokon|sazolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sazolothoro|sazolothoro]] || [[word:sazolojoro|sazolojoro]] || [[word:sazoloshoro|sazoloshoro]] || [[word:sazolokoro|sazolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
